title: alangium costatum
intro: Alangium costatum, also known as the Chinese allspice or Chinese angelica tree, is a plant species native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Cornaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Alangium costatum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Alangium costatum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be obtained through the plant's roots, leaves, and bark.
